title: Reinforcement learning with prediction-based rewards
titleZh: 基于预测的奖励强化学习
summary: We’ve developed Random Network Distillation (RND), a prediction-based method for encouraging reinforcement learning agents to explore their environments through curiosity, which for the first time exceeds average human performance on Montezuma’s Revenge.
summaryZh: 我们开发了随机网络蒸馏（ RND ） ，这是一种基于预测的方法，用于鼓励强化学习代理通过好奇心探索其环境，这首次超过了人类在Montezuma's Revenge上的平均表现。
highlights: We’ve developed Random Network Distillation (RND), a prediction-based method for encouraging reinforcement learning agents to explore their environments through curiosity, which fo
highlightsZh: 我们开发了随机网络蒸馏（ RND ） ，这是一种基于预测的方法，用于鼓励强化学习代理通过好奇心探索其环境，这首次超过了人类在Montezuma's Revenge上的平均表现。

title: Learning complex goals with iterated amplification
titleZh: 通过迭代扩增学习复杂的目标
summary: We’re proposing an AI safety technique called iterated amplification that lets us specify complicated behaviors and goals that are beyond human scale, by demonstrating how to decompose a task into simpler sub-tasks, rather than by providing labeled data or a reward function. Although this idea is in its very early stag
summaryZh: 我们提出了一种称为迭代放大的人工智能安全技术，通过演示如何将任务分解为更简单的子任务，而不是通过提供标记数据或奖励函数，使我们能够指定超出人类规模的复杂行为和目标。虽然这个想法还处于早期阶段

Although this idea is in its very early stag

title: OpenAI Scholars 2019: Applications open
summary: We are now accepting applications for our second cohort of OpenAI Scholars, a program where we provide 6–10 stipends and mentorship to individuals from underrepresented groups to study deep learning full-time for 3 months and open-source a project.
summaryZh: 我们现在正在接受第二批OpenAI学者的申请，该计划为来自代表性不足群体的个人提供6–10份津贴和指导，以全日制学习深度学习3个月并开源一个项目。
